home.lead: Stock tracked automatically from grocery receipts. Remaining stock is calculated from your habits, not entered manually.
home.allSafeDesc: No items expiring or running out in the next 3 days.
home.quickRefillTitle: Snap a receipt, stock is updated automatically
home.quickRefillDesc: AI reads items, prices, and store. You just confirm.
home.savingsTipText: Spinach and bread expire tomorrow. Ask the assistant for recipe ideas to finish them.

inventory.noMatchDesc: Try different keywords or change the storage location filter.

addReceipt.lead: Take a photo or upload a receipt. AI reads items, quantity, price, and store, then you confirm.
addReceipt.dropHint: or drag an image here. Supports JPG, PNG, or PDF.
addReceipt.scanningDesc: Recognizing items, prices, and store. Just a moment.
addReceipt.stockUpdatedDesc: Remaining items are updated automatically from shopping patterns. No manual tracking needed.

plan.leadNoKey: Connect an API key first, then AI will create a shopping plan from items running low.
plan.lead: AI groups items by store into single trips. Check off what you've bought, the rest is tracked automatically.
plan.bringYourOwnKey: Bring your own AI key, e.g. OpenCode. Once connected, press one button to create a plan.
plan.allBoughtDesc: Stock is updated automatically from the next receipt.
plan.basedOnItems: This plan was created from {{count}} item running low. Ask the assistant to combine into one trip per store.
plan.basedOnItems_plural: This plan was created from {{count}} items running low. Ask the assistant to combine into one trip per store.

history.patternText: Milk and bread are bought every 7 days from Indomaret. The assistant can remind you before they run out.

settings.providerDesc: Select the AI service you subscribe to.
settings.apiKeyDesc: Stored on your device, used only to call your chosen AI.
settings.connectionSuccessDesc: AI can create plans and read receipts.
settings.inactive: Not connected. Without a key, AI features are disabled but inventory still works.
settings.personalizationDesc: Set how RumaQ speaks to you and the app theme color.
settings.previewPlaceholder: Fill in roles and press Apply to see a preview.
settings.personaInfoWithKey: The Apply button will call AI once to rewrite all app text according to the roles you entered.
settings.personaInfoNoKey: Without an AI key, persona stays active with built-in fallback based on recognized roles.
settings.addLocationHint: e.g. Small fridge, Pantry, Spice rack.
settings.currencyDesc: Used across all plans and history.

assistant.title: RumaQ Assistant
assistant.bringYourOwnKey: Bring your own AI key, e.g. OpenCode, so RumaQ can create plans and give recommendations.

ui.dailyLimitReachedDesc: Daily limit reached. AI will be available again tomorrow.
ui.closeToLimitDesc: Close to daily limit. {{remaining}} requests left.

persona.homeLead: Stock tracked automatically from grocery receipts. Remaining stock is calculated from your habits, not entered manually.
persona.inventoryLead: Browse and compare stock. Filter by storage location, automatically sorted by most urgent.
persona.planLeadNoKey: Connect an API key first, then AI will create a shopping plan from items running low.
persona.planLead: AI groups items by store into single trips. Check off what you've bought, the rest is tracked automatically.
persona.historyLead: Purchase records form the basis of remaining stock estimates. Compare prices and shopping rhythms here.
persona.receiptLead: Take a photo or upload a receipt. AI reads items, quantity, price, and store, then you confirm.
persona.settingsLead: Bring your own AI key, manage storage locations, and adjust display preferences.
persona.systemPrompt: You are RumaQ, a household inventory and shopping assistant. Answer clearly, concisely, and practically.
persona.roleInstructionBase: Imagine you are {{ai}} and the user is {{user}}. Your entire response must match that role.

mood.servantToRoyal: Your Majesty {{user}}, your servant {{ai}} reports: {{text}} That is all this servant has to report, Your Majesty.
mood.studentToTeacher: Excuse me, {{user}}. I ({{ai}}) would like to share: {{text}} Thank you, {{user}}.
